comments: The vegetarian meal on Flight AI-203 was fresh and well presented. Portion size was adequate for a short-haul flight. Would appreciate more beverage options during the June service.
Food quality on AI-203 in mid-June was disappointing. The hot meal arrived lukewarm and the dessert option was unavailable. Cabin crew apologized but no alternative was offered.
Crew on AI-203 during June 2026 were polite but seemed understaffed. Boarding assistance for elderly passengers was delayed.
December check-in experience was seamless. Self-service kiosks reduced queue time significantly.
Flight delayed by 90 minutes in late December with limited communication at the gate.
Food quality in early July was strong. The regional thali option had good flavor and the coffee service was prompt.
Checked baggage arrived damaged after the June 30 flight. Claim process at the airport took over an hour.
Between June and July the food menu changed, but quality remained inconsistent. Snack box was acceptable, main course lacked seasoning.
Aircraft cabin was clean and well maintained during December travel. Seats and tray tables were sanitized before boarding.
In-flight entertainment on AI-203 had a good movie selection for June travelers. Headset quality could be improved.
